summary: DATA-001 Import Bridge Testing Complete - All 38 tests passed (22 unit tests + 16 API tests). All import admin endpoints verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Import bridge correctly implements atomic claim pattern (find_one_and_update) to prevent duplicate processing
Unique index on (tenant_id, connector_id, external_reservation_id) prevents duplicate import records
Import worker uses exponential backoff (30s, 2min, 10min, 30min, 2hr) for retries
Error classification distinguishes retryable (timeout, network, write conflict) from permanent (mapping, validation, duplicate) errors
Booking creation uses create_booking_atomic ensuring single booking creation path
Lineage linking properly updates reservation_lineage with booking_id after successful import
Health deep endpoint includes comprehensive import_bridge metrics (pending, processing, retry, review_required, failed, provider_failures)
seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: DATA-001 import bridge fully tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/imports/status returns pending_auto_import, processing, imported, review_required, retry, failed, duplicate counts plus worker metrics with running=true. (2) GET /api/imports/review-queue returns paginated list with provider/tenant_id filters. (3) GET /api/imports/events returns paginated imports with status/provider/tenant_id filters. (4) POST /api/imports/{id}/retry returns 404 for non-existent IDs, resets failed/review_required to pending. (5) POST /api/imports/{id}/approve-and-import returns 404 for non-existent IDs, approves and triggers auto-import. (6) POST /api/imports/{id}/dismiss returns 404 for non-existent IDs, marks as dismissed. (7) GET /health/deep includes import_bridge section with status, counts, oldest_pending_seconds, provider_failures. (8) Import worker is running (worker.running=true in status). (9) Duplicate import records rejected by unique index. (10) All 22 unit tests pass covering: decision classification, record creation, auto-import, duplicate prevention, review required, retry scheduling, max retries, concurrent claim, admin actions, lineage linking, error classification.

import_review_queue_api.description: Returns paginated list with provider/tenant_id filters

import_events_api.description: Returns paginated imports with status/provider/tenant_id filters

health_deep_import_bridge.description: Includes import_bridge section with status, counts, provider_failures

duplicate_import_rejected.description: Unique index prevents duplicate import records
